Semiconductor group sees steady enterprise demand

Semiconductor equipment suppliers and large chip designers reported stable ordering trends this week, with enterprise demand holding up despite a mixed macro backdrop. Industry strategists said the group continues to benefit from AI server spending and that channel inventories look cleaner than they did earlier in the year.

The same analysts warned that investor expectations are now higher across the group, which could make post-earnings reactions more sensitive to guidance wording. Even so, sector commentary remains broadly constructive for companies with strong data center exposure.
